# 025 — Dedicated "5. Video" tab + auto-generated title / description / thumbnail — History

## [FEATURE] 025-VIDEO-TAB-AND-METADATA — 2026-07-20
Scaffolded after the user asked to split the `Xuất video …` controls out of "4. Nghe audio"
into a new "5. Video" tab, and to auto-generate title / description / thumbnail per part in
batch mode. Branch `changes/025-VIDEO-TAB-AND-METADATA`. Prompt: `025.00-PROMPT.md`.
Scope excludes YouTube OAuth/upload (parked under 024).

## [PLAN] 025.01-VIDEO-TAB-AND-METADATA-PLAN — 2026-07-20
Generated plan: `025.01-VIDEO-TAB-AND-METADATA-PLAN.md` (via the Plan subagent). Summary:
Phase A extracts a new `VideoTab(QWidget)` (own picker + voice + status/progress/cancel)
registered as "5. Video" in `workspace.py` (6 wiring spots), stripping the video controls
from `AudioTab`. Phase B adds `translated_author` to `NovelMeta` + pure `build_upload_title`
/ `build_video_description` builders in `tts/video.py` (reusing `_yt_timestamp`). Phase C adds
a Pillow `render_thumbnail` reusing `player_skin.py` helpers + a glow/stroke approximation of
the decorative font (no new font bundled in v1). Phase D hooks metadata generation into
`VideoWorker.run` (part N = window index+1, real per-chapter durations via
`_with_real_durations`), writing `.title.txt` / `.txt` / `.jpg` next to each mp4 in all modes
(Phần N omitted only for the single whole-novel `all` video). Phases E (packaging, only if a
font is bundled) + F (pure-builder + Qt-smoke tests). Confirmed by user: all-modes, approximate
glow font now, editable credit (default "Fox Novel"), editable empty tagline.

## [PLAN] 025.01 update — auto-generated tags (Phase G) — 2026-07-20
User asked to also auto-generate YouTube tags via the LLM engines (CLI Agent / LM Studio) like
"2. Dịch". Updated `025.00-PROMPT.md` (new "Auto-generated tags" section, reference screenshot
of ~19 novel-level VN tags at 405/500 chars) and added **Phase G** to the plan: give the LLM
engines a general `complete(prompt)` capability (refactor cli_agent/lmstudio/claude; Google
excluded via `can_generate_tags=False`); pure `build_tags_prompt` + `parse_tags` (dedup +
YouTube 500-char budget counting +2 for multi-word tags → the 405/500 behaviour); persist on
`NovelMeta.tags` via `save_tags`; a `TagsWorker` + engine picker + "Tạo tags" button in the
Video tab; write `<out>.tags.txt` per part. Open confirmation: auto-generate-on-empty vs
button-only.

## [CONFIRM] User decisions — 2026-07-20
All recommended: metadata in **all modes** (single whole-novel video drops "- Phần N");
**approximate the glow font now** (bundled 023 font + Pillow glow); **editable credit**
default "Fox Novel"; **editable tagline**, empty default; tag engine = **own picker in the
Video tab** (LLM-only, defaults to the translator engine); tags = **auto-generate if empty
at render start + a manual "Tạo tags" button**.

## [STEP 1] Implemented end-to-end — 2026-07-20
Built the whole feature; full suite green (558 passed, 5 live-deselected), ruff clean.

**Phase B — models/storage + builders.** Added `translated_author` and `tags` to `NovelMeta`
(`models.py`); extended `save_meta_translation(..., author="")` and added `save_tags()`
(`storage/project.py`). New pure builders in `tts/video.py`: `build_upload_title` (drops
"- Phần N" when part is None) and `build_video_description` (exact prompt shape; drops the
quoted VN author when `translated_author` is empty; whole-novel `Số chương`; chapter table
via the shared `_yt_timestamp`).

**Phase C — thumbnail.** New `tts/thumbnail.py`: `render_thumbnail` (1280×720 JPEG/PNG,
≤2 MB) reusing `player_skin._cover_fit`, a smooth top/bottom alpha `_scrim` (no hard band),
top-left wrapped title + bottom-center "PHẦN N" + tagline, all with a cyan Pillow glow +
white/dark-stroke. Pure `_wrap_title` helper. Unreadable base image → neutral backdrop.

**Phase G — tags via LLM.** Added `can_generate_tags` + a general `complete(prompt)` to the
`Translator` base (default raises); implemented `complete()` on cli_agent / lmstudio / claude
(each `translate()` now delegates to it); Google stays `can_generate_tags=False`. New pure
`tts/tags.py`: `build_tags_prompt` (asks for VN title + no-dấu variants + genre/format tags),
`parse_tags` (dedupe + YouTube 500-char budget, +2 per multi-word tag), `format_tags`.

**Phase D + workers.** `VideoWorker` gained `font_key/credit/tagline/thumb_image_path/tags`
params and a `_write_metadata` helper writing `.title.txt` / `.txt` (richer, overwrites
render_video's) / `.tags.txt` / `.jpg` per part (part N = window index+1; thumbnail failure
swallowed). New `TagsWorker` (mirrors TranslateWorker engine params). `TranslateWorker` now
translates + persists the author too (identity path included).

**Phase A — VideoTab.** New `gui/tab_video.py` (`VideoTab`) with its own picker/voice/status/
progress/cancel, the moved video controls, a thumbnail+metadata box, and a tags box (LLM
engine+model picker, "Tạo tags", editable list). Stripped all video controls/handlers from
`tab_audio.py`. Registered "5. Video" in `workspace.py` (all wiring spots + the 5-tab tuples).
Auto-generates tags if empty before a render, then launches. New config keys:
`video_thumbnail_image`, `video_credit`, `video_tagline`, `video_tags_engine`.

**Phase F — tests.** Added `test_video_metadata.py`, `test_tags.py`, `test_thumbnail.py`,
`test_tab_video.py` (41 new tests): builder shapes, empty-author fallback, tag budget math,
engine capability flags, thumbnail size/≤2 MB/unreadable-base, VideoTab contract + Workspace
5-tab registration. Phase E (bundling a display font) intentionally skipped per the confirmed
"approximate now" decision.

## [STEP 2] AI thumbnail-image prompt + shared engine picker — 2026-07-20
User asked for a box that auto-generates an AI image-generation prompt (Midjourney/SD/DALL·E)
fitting the novel, and to move the engine choice to the top so one engine drives all AI
helpers. Implemented:
- Renamed the engine capability `can_generate_tags` → `supports_completion` (base + cli_agent
  + lmstudio + claude); it now backs two features.
- New generic `CompletionWorker(QThread)` (engine params + a prompt → the model's text, with
  the `supports_completion` guard).
- New pure `build_thumbnail_image_prompt(...)` in `tts/tags.py` — a Vietnamese instruction
  asking the LLM for an ENGLISH image prompt: a cinematic 16:9 xianxia/ancient-fantasy scene
  fitting the novel, no text/watermark (styled text is overlaid later).
- Persist the result on `NovelMeta.thumbnail_prompt` via `save_thumbnail_prompt` (backward-safe).
- `tab_video.py`: hoisted the engine+model picker to a shared top row (`_build_engine_row`,
  `ai_engine_combo`/`ai_model_edit`, `_ai_engine_params`), removed it from the tags box, and
  added a "Prompt tạo ảnh bìa (AI)" box ("Tạo prompt" + editable text + "Lưu"). Both tags and
  the image prompt now use the one engine. Loads the saved prompt on project select.
- Config: `video_tags_engine` → `video_ai_engine`, added `video_ai_model`.
- Tests updated for the rename + added `build_thumbnail_image_prompt`, `thumbnail_prompt`
  round-trip, and image-prompt tab controls. Full suite green (562 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 3] Choosable video background color — 2026-07-20
User asked to choose the video background color instead of the default pastel gradient.
- `player_skin.build_player_skin` gained a `bg_color=(r,g,b)|None` param: `None` keeps the
  pastel gradient; a color builds a vertical gradient from it (lighten 22% → color → darken
  10%) with soft glows tinted from the same hue. Added `_lighten`/`_darken`/`hex_to_rgb`.
- Threaded `bg_color` through `render_video` + `render_preview_frame` → `VideoWorker` /
  `VideoPreviewWorker` (hex "#rrggbb", parsed via `hex_to_rgb`; "" = default).
- `tab_video.py`: a "Màu nền" color picker (`QColorDialog`) + "Mặc định" reset in the Xuất
  video box, with a live swatch on the button; applies to both the preview and the render.
  Persisted via new `config.video_bg_color`.
- Tests: `build_player_skin` custom-color changes the backdrop; `hex_to_rgb` parse/reject;
  tab loads/resets the color. Full suite green (565 passed), ruff clean.
- Caveat (flagged to user): burned-in title text is styled for a LIGHT backdrop, so a very
  dark chosen color lowers title contrast — adaptive light/dark title text is a follow-up.

## [STEP 4] Adaptive title text (light-on-dark) — 2026-07-20
Resolved the STEP 3 caveat. `build_ass_subtitles` now takes `bg_color` and picks a title
palette by backdrop luminance (`_text_palette`, threshold 140): dark-on-light (the original
`&H00A06B8A`/`&H00502A55`, no outline) for the default/light backgrounds, or light-on-dark
(soft lavender novel + near-white chapter + a width-2 dark outline for legibility on mid-tones)
when the chosen color is dark. Threaded `bg_color` from `render_video`/`render_preview_frame`
into `build_ass_subtitles`. Default output is byte-identical (guarded by existing + new tests).
Verified visually: titles stay crisp on a navy backdrop and a teal mid-tone. Full suite green
(568 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 5] Auto-wrap long chapter titles — 2026-07-20
User reported long chapter titles overflowing the frame / overlapping the left photo. Cause:
the ASS header used `WrapStyle: 2` (no auto-wrapping). Changed to `WrapStyle: 0` (smart
wrapping) so libass breaks a long title onto balanced lines that fit within the right-column
box (PlayResX − MarginL − MarginR). Hard breaks are still emitted as `\N` by `_escape_ass`
(break under any wrap style), so nothing else changed. Added a test asserting `WrapStyle: 0`;
verified with a 3-line title that stays inside the right column. Full suite green (569 passed),
ruff clean.

## [STEP 6] Live color tuning in the preview window — 2026-07-20
User wanted to adjust the background color while the preview is open (instead of the
close→pick→re-preview loop). Reworked the preview into a persistent, NON-modal `QDialog`
(`_build_preview_dialog`) holding the rendered frame + a color-control row ("Đổi màu nền…",
"Mặc định", "Cập nhật", "Đóng", status label). `_on_preview_ready` creates the dialog once
then swaps the pixmap in place. Changing the color — from the dialog's button OR the tab's
"Chọn màu…" button — calls `_maybe_refresh_preview`, which re-renders into the same window
("⏳ Đang cập nhật…" + controls disabled during the ~1–2s ffmpeg render). The in-dialog button
shows a live swatch (`_style_color_button`, shared with the tab button). Dialog refs clear on
close; `shutdown` closes it. Removed the now-unused `QDialogButtonBox` import. Tests: preview-
ready builds a live dialog with a pixmap + controls and clears on close; changing color
re-renders only when a preview is open. Full suite green (571 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 7] Parts list + skip-already-created (batch "continue") — 2026-07-21
User wanted a list of the batch part-videos (like the audio tab's chapter table) to render
only the missing parts and skip the ones already made.
- Extracted the output naming into a pure `video_part_name(slug, first, last, whole_novel=)`
  in `tts/video.py`; `VideoWorker` now uses it, and gained `skip_existing` (skips a part when
  its .mp4 already exists — the "tạo tiếp" behavior).
- `tab_video.py`: a new "Danh sách phần video" `QTableWidget` (Phần | Chương | Trạng thái | nút),
  `_refresh_video_list` computes the parts from the current voice/mode/range/batch via
  `plan_merge_windows` and marks each ✅ Đã tạo / ⬜ Chưa tạo by checking the output path; each
  row has a "Tạo"/"Tạo lại" button that renders just that part (`_render_one` → a range-mode
  worker for the part's chapters). The list refreshes on voice/mode/batch/range change, project
  select, and after a render.
- The main "Tạo video" now skips existing parts (`skip_existing=True`); the confirm dialog
  counts them ("Sẽ tạo N video (bỏ qua M phần đã có)…") and short-circuits with "Đã tạo hết"
  when nothing is pending. `_launch_video` was generalised to take mode/start/end/batch +
  skip_existing overrides (per-row render reuses it).
- Tests: `video_part_name` (windowed + whole-novel), `VideoWorker.skip_existing` carried, and
  tab-list tests (rows per part, existing→"✅/Tạo lại", per-row render uses range mode). Full
  suite green (577 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 8] Title / description / thumbnail in the parts list — 2026-07-21
User wanted the parts list to also carry the title + description and a button to open the
generated thumbnail, to make copy-pasting into YouTube on upload easier.
- Added a **Tiêu đề** column (computed via `build_upload_title`) and reworked the action cell
  into a container with three buttons: **Tạo/Tạo lại**, **Chi tiết**, **Ảnh bìa** (the last
  enabled only when the part's `.jpg` exists).
- **Chi tiết** opens a dialog with the part's title / description / tags, each read-only and
  each with a Copy button (clipboard via `QApplication`), plus "Mở ảnh bìa" and "Mở thư mục
  video". Values come from the rendered sidecars (`.title.txt`/`.txt`/`.tags.txt`) when they
  exist, else are computed on the fly (`_part_metadata` → `build_upload_title` /
  `_compute_part_description` from stored `audio_seconds` / `meta.tags`), so the text is
  available even before a part is rendered.
- **Ảnh bìa** opens the part's thumbnail (`_open_part_thumbnail` via QDesktopServices), with a
  friendly notice if not rendered yet.
- Tests updated for the new 5-column layout (status now col 3, actions in a container at col 4)
  and added: title column shows "- Phần N", `_part_metadata` prefers sidecars then falls back,
  thumbnail button enabled only when the `.jpg` exists. Full suite green (580 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 9] Fix cramped/unreadable action buttons — 2026-07-21
The three per-row buttons were crushed unreadably narrow. Cause: the action column used
`ResizeToContents`, which sizes to item *text* and ignores cell *widgets*, so the column
collapsed to near-zero. Fixed: set column 4 to `Fixed` width 250, a default row height of 34px,
and gave the buttons compact padding (`3px 8px`) + sensible minimum widths (58/66/66) with 6px
spacing. Verified with an offscreen render — labels no longer truncate. Suite green (580),
ruff clean.

## [STEP 10] Duration column in the parts list — 2026-07-21
User wanted each part's total duration shown for a pre-render check (esp. YouTube's 12h cap).
Added a **Thời lượng** column (now 6 columns: Phần | Chương | Thời lượng | Tiêu đề | Trạng thái |
Thao tác) computed as `sum(c.audio_seconds)` over the part's chapters, formatted `H:MM:SS`
(`_format_hms`). A part exceeding 12h is flagged red + "⚠️" with a tooltip ("Vượt 12 giờ —
YouTube giới hạn 12h/video"). `_duration_item` builds the cell. Tests: duration sums a part's
audio ("2:00" for 2×60s), >12h flagged with ⚠️; existing column-index tests shifted (title→3,
status→4, actions→5). Verified with an offscreen render (10×40min → "6:40:00"). Suite green
(582 passed), ruff clean.

## [STEP 11] New quality preset "Cao — 1080p, không đĩa xoay" — 2026-07-21
Added a `high_static` preset to `VIDEO_QUALITY_PRESETS` (1920×1080, 25fps, `spin_vinyl=False`,
speed 5.0) — full 1080p but dropping the per-frame vinyl rotate (the biggest filter cost), so
it's markedly faster than "high" (3.0) while slower than 720p "fast" (9.0). Added the combo item
"Cao — 1080p, không đĩa xoay" (between the two 1080p/720p entries) + a tooltip describing all
four. It flows through preview and render automatically (both read `preset["spin_vinyl"]`).
Test: `high_static` is 1080p + no spin with speed between high and fast. Suite green (583),
ruff clean.
